# 搬瓦工使用指南

> 独立中文 BandwagonHost（搬瓦工）知识库，覆盖 VPS 购买、套餐选择、IP 更换、KiwiVM、机房迁移、续费、退款、备份和网络故障排查。不是 BandwagonHost 官方网站。

Canonical site: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/
Language: zh-CN
Author: AI设计钟师傅
Last reviewed: 2026-07-13
Affiliate disclosure: 部分官网链接含 aff=83193，作者可能获得佣金；这不改变事实核对标准。

## Primary sources

- [BandwagonHost service news](https://bandwagonhost.com/news)

## Editorial policy

- Facts about current prices, inventory and benefits are time-sensitive and must be checked against the official order page.
- Product links may include affiliate parameters; factual claims are separated from commercial calls to action.
- High-impact claims include a direct official source wherever one is available.
